name: Fritters (Pets De Nonne)
recipeInstructions:
1. Load the dough into a pastry bag fitted with a medium star tip.
2. Heat the oil to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Sift together the cinnamon and sugar.
4. Holding the pastry bag above the hot oil, gently squeeze the bag and slice off 1-inch sections of paste using a paring knife.
5. Pipe out only as many fritters as will fit comfortably in the oil.
6. When the fritters are golden (approximately 23 minutes), flip them over to cook the other side.
7. Lift the fritters out of the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on layers of paper towels.
8. Sprinkle with the cinnamon sugar mixture while still warm.
Yield: Enough for a party
The cinnamon sugar topping on these fritters is reminiscent of that used on Latin American beignets such as churros.
